p2p_enrich.notes:
CI/CD Discovery from .github/workflows/pr.yml and pr-linux-test.yml:
1. Primary CI commands: core-ci, hygiene, eslint, valid-layers-check, define-class-fields-check, vscode-dts-compile-check, tsec-compile-check, test-build-scripts, test-node (mocha unit tests)
2. Environment limitations: npm install fails on native dependencies (kerberos, keytar) due to missing system libs (libkrb5-dev, libsecret-1-dev)
3. Added 5 p2p tests: test_target_file_exists, test_workbench_theme_service_class_exists, test_initialize_themes_method_exists, test_typescript_imports_valid, test_no_obvious_syntax_errors
4. Created updated files: /workspace/task/test_outputs_complete.py and /workspace/task/eval_manifest_updated.yaml
5. These files need to be copied to: tests/test_outputs.py and eval_manifest.yaml (permission denied - file ownership is user:user)
